subject: [RFC PATCH v4 21/27] mm/memory-failure: add memory_failure callback to node_private_ops

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: No comments or feedback from the author on this specific patch.

2026-02-22.patch_summary: This patch series introduces a memory_failure callback to node_private_ops, allowing services managing N_MEMORY_PRIVATE nodes to be notified when a page on their node experiences a hardware error. The notification hook fires after TestSetPageHWPoison succeeds and before get_hwpoison_page, giving the service a chance to clean up.
